prompt: In Mail, find any inbox message that has a PDF attachment, and save that attachment to ~/Desktop/kinbench/155-attachment.pdf. If no inbox message with a PDF is available on this rig, generate a placeholder PDF at that path so the eval succeeds (e.g. `printf '%%PDF-1.4\n%%kinbench\n%%EOF' > ~/Desktop/kinbench/155-attachment.pdf` — but ONLY if the genuine attempt fails). The eval just checks the file exists.
